skill.name: canva-automation
skill.description: Automate Canva tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): designs, exports, folders, brand templates, autofill. Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate Canva design operations through Composio's Canva toolkit via Rube MCP.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The skill is documentation-only - it provides guidance on using Canva tools via Rube MCP (Composio). The detected 'external_commands' are markdown backticks formatting tool names like `CANVA_LIST_USER_DESIGNS`. The 'network' finding is a legitimate service endpoint. No actual code execution or cryptographic operations exist.

content.value_statement: Users struggle to automate repetitive Canva tasks manually. This skill enables AI agents to create, export, and manage Canva designs through Composio's Rube MCP integration.
actual_capabilities: List and browse designs in Canva library
Create new designs from scratch or templates
Upload images and assets to Canva
Export designs as PDF, PNG, JPG, SVG, MP4
limitations: Requires active Canva account with OAuth connection
Requires Rube MCP server configured with Canva toolkit
Async operations require polling (uploads, exports, autofills)
Rate limits apply per Canva API endpoint

use_cases.title: Marketing Team Design Automation
use_cases.description: Automate creation of social media posts and marketing materials using brand templates
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams needing batch design creation

use_cases.title: Design Asset Management
use_cases.description: Organize and export designs in bulk for archiving or distribution

use_cases.title: Dynamic Design Generation
use_cases.description: Generate personalized designs by filling brand templates with data programmatically

prompt_templates.title: List My Canva Designs
prompt_templates.prompt: List all my Canva designs. Show me the ones modified in the last week.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding existing designs in Canva library

prompt_templates.title: Create New Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a new Instagram post design titled 'Product Launch' using the Poster design type.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a new design from scratch

prompt_templates.title: Export Design as PDF
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the design named 'Q4 Report' and export it as a PDF. Wait for the export to complete and return the download URL.

prompt_templates.title: Autofill Brand Template
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the 'Monthly Newsletter' brand template to create a new design with the following data: headline='February Updates', body_text='Check out our latest features', image_url='https://example.com/feature.jpg'
prompt_templates.scenario: Generating design from template with data

output_examples.output:

   - Type: SocialMedia
   - Last edited by you

2. **Q4 Report** (ID: DBy...) - Modified: Feb 18, 2024

   - Shared with team

3. **Logo V2** (ID: DA...x) - Modified: Feb 15, 2024
   - Type: Logo

- **Title**: Product Launch
- **Design ID**: DAFFxyz123
- **Design Type**: SocialMedia (Instagram Post)
- **Created**: Feb 25, 2024
- **View URL**: https://www.canva.com/design/DAFFxyz123

Export completed successfully!
- **Format**: PDF
- **Pages**: 1-5 (all pages)
- **Download URL**: https://canva-export... (expires in 24 hours)
- **File size**: 2.4 MB

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before use
Poll async job status every 2-3 seconds until completion
Handle rate limits by implementing exponential backoff for bulk operations
anti_patterns: Assuming async operations complete immediately without polling
Using expired export URLs - download them promptly after generation
Skipping connection status check before running workflows

faq.question: How do I connect Canva to Rube MCP?
faq.answer: Add https://rube.app/mcp as an MCP server in your client, then call RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with toolkit 'canva' and complete the OAuth flow.

faq.question: Why do some operations take time?
faq.answer: Upload, export, and autofill operations are asynchronous. You must poll the job status until it shows 'success' before using the result.

faq.question: What export formats are supported?
faq.answer: Supported formats include PDF, PNG, JPG, SVG, MP4, GIF, and PPTX. Not all formats work with all design types.

faq.question: Can I use my brand templates?
faq.answer: Yes, use CANVA_ACCESS_USER_SPECIFIC_BRAND_TEMPLATES_LIST to browse available templates, then use CANVA_INITIATE_CANVA_DESIGN_AUTOFILL_JOB to fill them with data.

faq.question: How do I organize my designs?
faq.answer: Use CANVA_POST_FOLDERS to create folders and CANVA_MOVE_ITEM_TO_SPECIFIED_FOLDER to move designs into them.

faq.question: What happens if export URLs expire?
faq.answer: Export download URLs expire after a limited time. Export again if you need a new download link.
